news.t: Why it is risky for ETF investors to blindly chase the small-cap rally

holdings.infoBox: BSVO is an equity ETF with a total of 632 individual holdings. The top holdings are Victoria's Secret & Co. stock at 1.05%, Sphere Entertainment Co. at 0.81%, Viasat at 0.79%, Bread Financial Holdings at 0.77%, and Scorpio Tankers at 0.74%.

overview.description: The EA Bridgeway Omni Small-Cap Value ETF (BSVO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed, broad, and diverse portfolio of US-listed, small-cap stocks that appear fundamentally undervalued and have environmental, social, and governance attributes as perceived by the fund adviser. BSVO was launched on Aug 31, 2011 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: Why it is risky for ETF investors to blindly chase the small-cap rally
data.text: Hello! This is markets reporter Isabel Wang bringing you this week's ETF Wrap. In this week's edition, we take a look at small-cap ETFs, which attracted significant inflows in the past week as small-c...
